title: grammitis capillaris
intro: Grammitis capillaris, also known as Button Fern or Button Polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis capillaris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and enhance immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
